payload.answer: A conflict has been detected: existing memory states Sara is your daughter, but the new input states Sara is your niece. These are mutually exclusive relationships for the same entity. Please clarify: (1) Is this a correction — Sara is actually your niece, not your daughter? (2) Are these two different people both named Sara? No update has been committed until this is resolved.

entity_resolution.reason: The same name 'Sara' is associated with two mutually exclusive familial relationships (daughter vs. niece). It is possible these refer to the same person with a corrected relationship, or two different people named Sara. Cannot resolve without clarification.

details: Conflict detected between existing fact ('Sara is my daughter') and incoming fact ('Sara is my niece').
No memory update committed due to direct contradiction.
User clarification required before any write operation is performed.
Existing memory preserved in its current state pending resolution.

repair_options: Replace existing relationship: update Sara's relationship from 'daughter' to 'niece' if this is a correction.
Disambiguate entities: treat these as two different people named Sara and request a distinguishing detail (e.g., last name, age, context).
Retain existing fact and discard incoming input if the new input is believed to be an error.
Mark Sara's relationship as ambiguous/unknown until the user provides explicit confirmation.
